dialogues: Equal groups are everywhere, but not every group of things is an equal group. Look at these four pictures. Each picture has 18 items in total. Which ones show equal groups, the same number in every group?

Right. The first picture has 3 shelves with 6 on each. Equal groups. The third picture has 2 stacks of 9. Equal groups. We can write multiplication equations for these. The other two? The groups aren't equal. Different amounts in different groups. We can't write a multiplication equation for those.
